meta.title: Moonlight Sonata I - Yangqin
meta.author: Ludwig van Beethoven; TsukiSynth cimbalom/yangqin conversion from Mutopia MIDI
meta.description: First movement of Piano Sonata No. 14 in C-sharp minor, Op. 27 No. 2, rendered through TsukiSynth cimbalom/yangqin-style steel strings and wood mallets. Source MIDI: Mutopia Project, Stewart Holmes edition, Berners 1908 source, CC BY-SA 2.5.
